description:
Remove the multi-project registry concept. Each ao CLI instance should only manage the repo it's mounted in.

Changes needed:
1. Delete daemon_registry.rs (sync_project_registry, multi-project scanning)
2. Remove include_registry field from DaemonStartArgs, DaemonStartInput, and MCP daemon start input
3. Remove ao.project.list MCP tool from ops_mcp.rs
4. Simplify daemon_run.rs startup — no registry sync, just use project_root directly
5. Remove include_registry CLI flag from daemon start command
6. Update daemon tick to only operate on the current project_root, no multi-project iteration
7. Clean up any "registry" references in config.rs, daemon_events.rs, tests

The daemon should derive everything from --project-root (or cwd). No scanning, no registry file, no multi-project awareness.
title: Remove project registry and scope daemon to single mounted repo
